data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Delivery status tracking' as part of the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that demonstrate the functionality of tracking delivery statuses for SMS messages. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was to confirm either coverage or a precise gap, which was not achieved.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or validation of delivery status tracking for SMS messages.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for delivery status tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system can track and report the delivery status of SMS messages.
